$comment: Source-of-truth manifest for the doc-drift-reminder PostToolUse hook. Each entry maps code paths (repo-relative globs) to the docs/files that hand-restate their facts, plus next-step notes. Keep in sync with scripts/check-doc-drift.ts and the sync-docs skill.

couplings.note: Root scripts are restated by name in CLAUDE.md, README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md and docs/getting-started.md. If you renamed/removed a script, update those docs. Verify with `bun run docs:check`.

Dev credentials (pk-mt-dev / sk-mt-dev, admin@memoturn.dev / memoturn-dev-123) are quoted in README.md, CLAUDE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, docs/getting-started.md and docs/sdk-*.md. If you changed them here, update those docs and .env.example. Verify with `bun run docs:check`.

Host ports (PG 5433, Redis 6380, Doris 9030 MySQL + 8030 HTTP, API 3001, worker 3002, console 3000) are restated in docs/configuration.md, docs/getting-started.md and CLAUDE.md. Update those if a port changed. Verify with `bun run docs:check`.

(1) The endpoint tables in docs/api.md are hand-maintained (no OpenAPI export to disk). If you added/removed/renamed a /v1 route, update docs/api.md to match. (2) If you added a mutating route (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE), it must call denyIfReadOnly(c) + declare a 403 — verify with `bun run rbac:check` (or delegate to the rbac-auditor agent).

The MCP tool registry is restated in apps/mcp/README.md (checked by `bun run docs:check`) AND in the site page apps/docs/src/content/docs/mcp.md (hand-maintained). If you added/renamed a tool, update both.

docs/*.md is the source of truth for the docs site — the mirror pages under apps/docs/src/content/docs/ must be resynced when content changes (docs:check only validates mechanical facts there, not content parity). See the sync-docs skill for the site adaptation conventions, or delegate to the doc-sync-auditor agent.
Worker cron schedules are documented in CLAUDE.md. If you changed a `repeat: { pattern }`, update CLAUDE.md. Verify with `bun run docs:check`.

events.ts is the shared ingest wire contract (SDK + API + worker). A shape change usually also needs apps/worker/src/mappers.ts, the row types + column specs in packages/telemetry, an infra/doris/*.sql migration, and the events.test.ts / mappers.test.ts tests. See the ingest-event-change skill or delegate to the ingest-syncer agent.

Add the reverse relation on `Project` for any new project-scoped model, then run `cd packages/db && set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; bunx prisma migrate dev --name <change>` and `bun run typecheck`. See the change-prisma-schema skill or delegate to the prisma-migrator agent.

The agent/skill rosters in .claude/README.md hand-restate every agent (name/model/color/use) and skill. If you added, renamed, or re-scoped an agent or skill, update the README tables. Agent↔skill pairs use `skills:` preloading — the skill is the knowledge source of truth; keep agent bodies procedure-only.

The telemetry store is the only home for engine SQL. Interface changes need the Doris impl + a conformance.test.ts case; schema changes need a NEW numbered infra/doris/*.sql file (shipped files are immutable — schema_migrations ledger). Conventions live in the doris-query skill; docs/architecture.md restates the storage story.
